artifact_kind: CurseForge modpack ZIP importable by Prism Launcher

preferred_launcher.name: Prism Launcher
preferred_launcher.install_action: Add Instance > Import > select the release ZIP

installation: Download the modpack ZIP from GitHub Releases, not Source code.zip.
Import the ZIP directly into Prism Launcher.
Allow Prism to download all CurseForge dependencies.
On first launch allow Euphoria Patcher to generate the patched shader.
If necessary select ComplementaryReimagined_r5.6.1 + EuphoriaPatches_1.7.7 in the shader menu.
Close Minecraft and run VERIFY-CLIENT.ps1 from the instance minecraft directory.
Do not join the server unless the verifier prints CLIENT VERIFICATION PASSED.

update_policy.method: Import a new release as a separate Prism instance.
preserve: server address entered by the user
worlds only when the user explicitly copies them
screenshots only when the user explicitly copies them

verification.pinned_dependency_rule: Every CurseForge dependency uses an exact projectID and fileID; no latest-version resolution is permitted.
verification.success_condition: release script prints VERIFICATION PASSED and installed-client script prints CLIENT VERIFICATION PASSED

troubleshooting.dependency_download_failed: Retry later or open Prism settings and re-authenticate CurseForge if requested.
troubleshooting.out_of_memory: Set 8192-12288 MiB, close heavy applications, and do not allocate all system RAM.
troubleshooting.shader_missing: Verify Oculus and Euphoria Patcher are installed, launch once, then select the generated shader manually.
troubleshooting.server_mod_mismatch: Run VERIFY-CLIENT.ps1. Do not connect until it prints CLIENT VERIFICATION PASSED.
